name: Extra Cash Gold & Loan
description_short: Multi-location pawn shop in Oklahoma City offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and general merchandise with both in-store and online shopping options.
description_long:
Extra Cash Pawn operates three locations across Oklahoma City, positioning itself as a pawn shop offering short and long-term loans on personal items. The company emphasizes a professional, clean, and secure environment for customers seeking quick access to cash. Founded with a focus on customer service, Extra Cash Pawn has built a reputation through competitive pricing and a wide variety of merchandise categories.

The company's primary service is providing pawn loans on collateral including gold, jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and general brand-name merchandise. Customers can also buy and sell items directly. Extra Cash Pawn offers both traditional in-store services and modern conveniences including an online shopping platform (shop.extracashpawn.com), curbside pickup, and a MobilePawn app for loan renewals and layaway payments. Their loan terms are described as flexible, with options for short and long-term arrangements.

Extra Cash Pawn distinguishes itself through operational cleanliness and professionalism—specifically highlighted as "the cleanest pawnshop" by customers. The company maintains consistent hours across all three locations (Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 9am-6pm, Sunday 12pm-5pm) and emphasizes confidentiality in transactions. Their product categories span luxury items (designer jewelry), recreational equipment (firearms and accessories), entertainment (musical instruments), and general merchandise, creating a diverse inventory.

As a traditional pawn shop, Extra Cash Pawn's business model relies on collateral-based lending, which means customers must own items of sufficient value to qualify for loans. While the company advertises quick and convenient service, pawn loans carry inherent limitations compared to unsecured personal loans—loan amounts are capped by item value, and failure to repay results in loss of collateral. The company does not publicly disclose interest rates, terms, or specific loan conditions on their website, requiring customers to visit in person or contact locations directly for detailed loan information.
address: 2111 W Hefner Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73120

company_info.headquarters: 2111 W Hefner Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73120

pros: Three conveniently located Oklahoma City branches with consistent operating hours
Modern digital options including online shopping, curbside pickup, and MobilePawn app for loan renewals
Wide variety of merchandise categories: jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and brand-name goods
Customers specifically praise cleanliness and professional environment compared to typical pawn shops
Offers both short-term and long-term loan options on collateral
Emphasizes confidentiality and security in transactions
Allows customers to buy, sell, or pawn items—flexible transaction options
cons: Loan amounts strictly limited by collateral value—not suitable for larger cash needs
No interest rates, fees, or loan terms publicly disclosed on website; requires in-person inquiry
Collateral-based lending means defaulted loans result in loss of personal items
Limited to Oklahoma City locations only—no multi-state or nationwide availability
Pawn loans require customers to own valuable items, excluding those without collateral
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, instruments, firearms) who need short-term cash quickly
Customers seeking to buy discounted brand-name merchandise or specialty items
People who prefer confidential transactions and want to avoid credit checks
Those looking to renew existing pawn loans or make layaway payments through mobile app
diagnosis: Extra Cash Pawn is best for Oklahoma City residents with valuable collateral who need quick cash and prefer confidential transactions without credit checks. The main caveat is that loan amounts are strictly limited by item value, making this unsuitable for larger cash needs, and customers must be willing to risk losing collateral if unable to repay.
services: Short-term collateral-based pawn loans on gold and jewelry
Purchase and sale of designer and custom jewelry
Firearms and accessories buying, selling, and pawn loans
Musical instruments buying, selling, and pawn loans
General brand-name merchandise buying and selling
Online shopping platform with curbside pickup option
MobilePawn app for loan renewals and layaway payments
In-store shopping at three Oklahoma City locations
